title: Old Lady House
description: The grunty one physically abuses the shrill one, and the shrill one psychologically abuses the grunty one.
quote: You want to sleep? Well I’ll sleep you!
altHero: Bonnie Kelly at the kitchen table, yelling at Mrs. McDonald
alt1: Bonnie lifting a hammer above Mrs. McDonald’s sleeping head
alt2: Mrs. McDonald staring directly into the camera
alt3: Deandra Reynolds making a cheesy entrance
